calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Nov-17-2014 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Nov-17-2014 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from The Presiding Judge Department 206 for Entry of Judgment.
Department 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6840.

David Marcolini, Esq., appearing specially for Plaintiff STERLING JEWELERS, INC., dba KAY JEWELERS.
No appearance on behalf or by Defendant ZENEKA M. REED, aka ZENEKA REED.
Defendants Does 1-10 dismissed without prejudice.
John Paul Murphy sworn and examined on behalf of the Plaintiff.
After evidence, Court ordered the following Judgment entered in favor of Plaintiff Sterling Jewelers, Inc., dba Kay Jewelers and against Defendant Zeneka M. Reed, aka Zeneka Reed as follows:
Damages $3,964.99
Pre-Judgment Interest $1,672.07
Attorney's Fees $746.00
Costs $300.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $6,683.06
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-24-2014 Set For Trial On Nov-17-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
